title: OperatingBudget v1
description: Authored risk-acceptance contract stating the physical operating envelope within which unattended dispatch may run. A statement of will, not belief: what Derek accepts, not what sensors have observed. Clause-2 object — reason and authored_by are mandatory; every constraint is explicit and nullable (null = that dimension unconstrained).

max_gpu_temp_c.description: Hard ceiling on gpu_temp_c_peak. Null = unconstrained.

max_power_w.description: Hard ceiling on power_w_peak. Null = unconstrained.

max_fan_rpm.description: Hard ceiling on fan_rpm_avg (the only fan sensor). Null = unconstrained.

unattended_dispatch_allowed.description: Explicit authored permission for unattended dispatch. False means the budget does not authorize any unattended operation regardless of physical readings.

start.description: 24-hour HH:MM start of the allowed dispatch window.

end.description: 24-hour HH:MM end of the allowed dispatch window.

active_hours.description: Allowed dispatch window. Null = no time restriction.

reason.description: Why this budget was authored — stated for a human operator.

authored_by.description: Identity of the person or process that created this contract.

created.description: ISO-8601 datetime when this contract was authored. Optional.

suspended.description: When true, all dispatch is blocked regardless of other fields. An emergency stop that does not require deleting the contract.

suspend_reason.description: Explains why suspended was set. Null when not suspended.
